commit.message:
ci: 將 GitHub Actions 版本改為 SHA pin 以強化供應鏈安全

將 CI 與 GitHub Pages 工作流程中的第三方 Action 由可變動的版本標籤（例如 v4、v5）改為固定 commit SHA，並在行尾保留對應版本註解，讓版本來源更清楚。

改為 SHA pin 的主要原因是避免上游標籤被重新指向或遭惡意替換時，工作流程在未察覺的情況下執行到非預期程式碼；同時可提升流程的可重現性與稽核可追溯性。

影響方面：既有 CI 與部署行為、觸發條件與輸出結果不變；後續升級 Action 需明確更新 SHA，安全審查與變更管理會更可控。

commit.message:
fix: resolve all 18 display bugs from deep UI audit (#1125)

Fixes #1107, #1108, #1109, #1110, #1111, #1112, #1113, #1114, #1115,
#1116, #1117, #1118, #1119, #1120, #1121, #1122, #1123, #1124

BUG-1 (#1107): Replace SelectionPromptValue/NullableSelectionPrompt with
ContentPanelMenu/ContentPanelMenuNullable when Live is active. These
render the menu to the content panel and use ReadKey for navigation,
avoiding the DefaultExclusivityMode lock that caused crashes. Startup
menus (pre-Live) continue to use AnsiConsole.Prompt. ShowSkillTreeMenu
gets inline content-panel navigation (Skill is a value type, not class).

BUG-4 (#1111): TakeSingleItem now calls ShowRoom after pickup to restore
room view.

BUG-5 (#1112): GoCommandHandler calls ShowRoom after CombatResult.Won
to update map (clears dead enemy [!]) and restore room view.

BUG-6 (#1113): ShowRoom tracks previous cached room ID; only logs
'Entered <room>' when transitioning to a new room (isNewRoom check).

BUG-7 (#1114): ApplyRoomHazard in GameLoop now calls ShowPlayerStats
instead of RefreshDisplay, so hazard damage messages stay visible.

BUG-8 (#1115): ShowCombatStart clears _contentLines and sets header to
'⚔  Combat' before appending — starts a clean combat view each time.

BUG-9 (#1116): EquipCommandHandler and UnequipCommandHandler call
ShowRoom after equip/unequip to restore the room view.

BUG-10 (#1117): ShowEquipmentComparison syncs _contentLines,
_contentHeader, and _contentBorderColor when updating the live panel,
so subsequent AppendContent calls don't restore stale content.

BUG-11 (#1118) + BUG-18 (#1124): RefreshDisplay sets _currentFloor
first (fixes stale floor number in map header), then calls ShowPlayerStats
and ShowRoom. Removes redundant ShowMap call — ShowRoom already calls
RenderMapPanel.

ContestedArmory, PetrifiedLibrary, and ForgottenShrine before showing
their special symbols. Used rooms fall through to [+] Cleared.

BUG-13 (#1120): ShowCombatStatus appends HP bars to existing combat
history when _contentHeader == '⚔  Combat' (combat in progress);
only calls SetContent on first entry to establish the view.

BUG-14 (#1121): ShowFloorBanner calls RenderMapPanel after updating
_currentFloor so the map panel header updates immediately.

BUG-15 (#1122): TakeAllItems no longer calls ShowItemPickup per item
(which triggered N SetContent flashes). Instead shows a message per
item, then calls ShowRoom once at the end.

BUG-16 (#1123): GetRoomDisplayName now covers all RoomType values
(Standard, TrapRoom) instead of falling through to 'Room'.

feat(tui): markdown rendering, diff view, and streaming buffer (#190)

* feat(tui): add markdown rendering, diff view, and streaming buffer

- Add Markdig 0.40.0 for robust markdown parsing
- MarkdownRenderer: Markdig AST walker outputting Spectre.Console markup
  - H1→bold yellow, H2→bold cyan, H3→bold blue, H4+→bold
  - Bold / italic / inline code (highlighted)
  - Fenced code blocks with panel border + per-language keyword coloring
    (C#, Python, JS/TS, Go, Rust, Bash, SQL, JSON, YAML)
  - Ordered and unordered lists (nested ●/○/▸ bullets)
  - Tables via Spectre.Console Table
  - Block quotes with │ gutter
  - Thematic breaks (─── rule)
  - /slash-command tokens in prose are colored cyan when they match
    registered commands from SlashCommandCatalog
- DiffRenderer: unified diff detection and red/green coloring
  - --- / +++ headers → bold
  - @@ hunk lines → cyan
  - + lines → bold green; - lines → bold red; context → dim
- ChatRenderer: buffer streaming chunks in Rich mode; show live KB
  counter (e.g. '◆ 1.2 KB…') while receiving; clear indicator and
  render full markdown at EndStreaming. Plain/Compact/Json modes
  unchanged.
- 21 new unit tests covering DiffRenderer detection, edge cases, and
  MarkdownRenderer smoke tests for all block types

commit.message:
fix: FTS uses OR not AND for multi-term queries

Bug: findAnchors() was joining query terms with ' & ' (AND) by default,
so 'College Music education' became to_tsquery 'college & music & education'.
This requires all three words in the same molecule — almost never matches
in a conversational corpus.

Symptom in logs:
  [Search] Atom search found 0 atoms for terms: college, music, education
  [Search] Anchors found: 0 Atoms, 5 Molecules. Final Unique: 4
  ...SmartSearch split into ['college','music'] → found 23 + 20 molecules

Fix: always join terms with ' | ' (OR). Any molecule containing at least
one query term now qualifies as a candidate anchor. The ts_rank_cd score
still rewards molecules that match MORE terms, so relevance ordering is
preserved — we just cast a wider net at the retrieval stage.

The fuzzy flag was already using | and is now a no-op (both paths identical).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: Replace buggy cp-a with git checkout in safe_commit.sh, reconcile 66 drift issues

Root cause: safe_commit.sh saved/restored files via cp -a through a
tmpdir when handling rebase conflicts. This silently failed for
directory args (state/), causing git to see no diff and exit 0 —
dropping the entire state commit.

Fix: Use git checkout $OUR_COMMIT -- $file instead of cp -a. This
uses git's own object store to extract files, which handles directories,
symlinks, and binary files correctly.

Also reconciles 66 accumulated drift issues in stats.json, channels.json,
and agents.json using posted_log as source of truth.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: audio status indicators for STT/TTS pipeline

Four distinct subtle chimes mark each phase:
  🔔 ready (ascending A5→D6, 80ms) - speak now
  📡 processing (soft blip, 25ms) - STT done, thinking
  🔊 speak (descending D6→A5, 70ms) - TTS audio starting
  ✅ done (double tap, 60ms) - TTS finished

All chimes auto-generated at runtime, non-blocking playback.
Removed old chime.wav in favor of chime_ready.wav.

commit.message:
feat(eval): add temporal dedup guard for identical code submissions

Hash-based temporal dedup cache prevents duplicate eval submissions within
a configurable time window (default 2s). Uses ConcurrentDictionary with
session-scoped keys for thread safety.

- EvalDedup module: create, tryGet, record, evictStale, clearSession
- Wired into sendFSharpCode: early return on dedup hit, record after eval
- Cache cleared on soft/hard session reset
- 15 tests: 11 example-based + 4 FsCheck property tests
